messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: A topic's icon tracks its ticket's state — set by the swarm, never left to rot by hand
What it solves: WHY AN ICON ACTUALLY MATTERS HERE — this is not decoration. TELEGRAM NEVER HIDES A CLOSED TOPIC.
Closing locks it; it stays in the list forever. So the topic list GROWS WITHOUT BOUND and closing
a topic does nothing for legibility. The icon is therefore the ONLY per-topic signal that
separates hist…
How it works: A new topic is created with an icon reflecting its ticket's state
